title: Multimodal AI — working with text, image, audio, and video in one system

artifact_plan.diagram_intent: Modality fan-in diagram: four input lanes (text, image, audio, video) each passing through its own encoder, converging into the shared representation space, feeding the LLM reasoning core, and producing output
depth_signals: title spans four distinct modalities — strong multi-technology signal
